title: corethrogyne californica var. filaginifolia
intro: Corethrogyne californica var. filaginifolia, also known as California bush sunflower or California corethrogyne, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly found in the western United States and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant. Corethrogyne californica var. filaginifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make topical creams and salves.
